description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a large wooden terrace on the upper level. The exterior walls are primarily white with extensive use of large, rectangular windows that allow for ample natural light. The upper floor features a wooden deck enclosed by horizontal wooden slats, accessible via an exterior staircase with a black metal railing. The main entryway is a simple, light-colored wooden door with a gentle arch, located on the lower level. The house has a minimalist design with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious wooden terrace on the upper floor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upper terrace with wooden fencing, large windows, and the main entry door on the upper level.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase with a black railing and the wooden terrace extending from the upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the extensive window coverage on both floors and the wooden deck with black railing.
description_view_3: Back view showing the lower entry door, the upper terrace, and a clear view of the window arrangement on both levels.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple arched wooden door on the lower level, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
